## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, new artifacts, and image strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New SEO Strategy:** Internal links will use exact-match anchor text from a new GSC-based spreadsheet to boost target page rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [**Image Strategy Pivot:** To resolve brand alignment issues with free stock photos, the team will prioritize cityscapes/travel imagery and explore removing hero images for page speed.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [**Content Automation:** Two new artifacts—one for CTAs, one for Navan-owned statistics—will be programmatically added to new articles, streamlining content creation and legal review.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:** 5 articles are in progress, 5 await Navan marketing review in Airtable, and 4 are with legal.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)

## Topics

### Featured Image Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Free stock photos fail to meet brand guidelines, causing a bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [**Solution:** Pivot to cityscapes/travel imagery (highways, skyscrapers) over people-focused shots.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This aligns with the brand's existing photo mood board and avoids the "obviously AI" look of AI-generated people.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [**Contingency:** Libby will consult Navan's design team for a solution if the pivot is unsuccessful.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [**Future Idea:** Remove hero images from blog posts to improve page speed.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Requires a new process for social media meta images.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
      - [**Status:** To be discussed offline by Libby and Moran.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)

### Content Pipeline & Review

  - [**Legal Review Process:** Libby is meeting with legal today to define a clear, non-bottlenecking review process.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Content Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
      - [**In Progress:** 5 articles (due this week).](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
      - [**Awaiting Marketing Review:** 5 articles (in Airtable).](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [**Awaiting Legal Review:** 4 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [**Writing Guidelines:** GrowthX is refining guidelines for a more conversational tone and smoother transitions. Navan's specific feedback on choppy sections is critical for this improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)

### New Content Artifacts

  - [GrowthX developed two artifacts to automate content creation and improve quality.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [**1. CTA Artifact:**](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Programmatically adds CTAs for demos, webinars, and guides.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [**Status:** Integrated into the article generation pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
      - [**Action:** Navan team to review the artifact's content for alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [**2. Statistics Artifact:**](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Adds credible stats from Navan's own reports.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Using Navan-owned data streamlines legal review and provides a programmatic source for key themes.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
      - [**Status:** Pending integration into the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
      - [**Action:** Libby to share with legal to potentially accelerate content approval.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)

### Internal Linking Strategy

  - [**Resource:** Moran created a spreadsheet of GSC landing pages and their ranking keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [**New Rule:** Use these exact keywords as anchor text for internal links.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Provides a natural SEO boost to the linked pages.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [**New Rule:** Avoid linking to blog posts older than 12–18 months.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)

### AI Messaging Guidelines

  - [**Status:** Still pending from Navan.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
  - [**Impact:** GrowthX will not create any AI-related content until these guidelines are provided.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
  - [**Action:** Libby will follow up with the relevant team again.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)

      - [Follow up with Katya on the feasibility of adapting free stock photos.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [**Libby:**](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
      - [Share the stats artifact with the legal team for review.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
      - [Follow up on the AI messaging guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
      - [Consult the Navan design team if the image strategy pivot is unsuccessful.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [**Libby & Moran:**](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
      - [Discuss offline the feasibility of removing hero images from blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [**Navan Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [Review the 5 articles awaiting marketing review in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [Review the new CTA artifact content for alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/j58QJs7XxyWsuxya5167JrwUXY3fc3ox?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
